aligned_lyrics.text: 빈 객실 창에 비친 내 얼굴
Every turn shaking old words loose
So I stay awake between the lights
My thumb hovering like it’s afraid
빈 객실 창에 비친 내 얼굴
Every turn shaking old words loose
So I stay awake between the lights
Let the window breathe my doubt
빈 객실 창에 비친 내 얼굴
Every turn shaking old words loose
So I ride this loop inside my mind
